positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed celestial tapestry illustration featuring stylized mountain ranges silhouetted against a vibrant, nebula-filled sky. The foreground elements include minimalist constellations, abstract geometric floral patterns, and crystalline planetary rings. Use a deep indigo, sapphire blue, burnt orange, and gold color palette. The style should be a blend of Art Deco engraving and modern bioluminescence, maximizing crisp lines and strong contrast. The composition must be perfectly centered and designed to wrap seamlessly around apparel, ensuring no subject matter is cut off. Clean lines, high saturation, poster art quality, vector graphic feel.
